.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 11 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace maven-compiler-plugin source/target configuration with the release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to specify Java version in modern Maven compiler plugin configurations, ensuring consistent compilation and runtime behavior for Java 17.
Older compiler plugin versions may not fully support Java 17 features or the 'release' flag correctly; upgrading ensures proper compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from Gson dependency to rely on Spring Boot's managed version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x manages Gson version; specifying an explicit version can cause conflicts or override the managed compatible version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from git-commit-id-maven-plugin to rely on Spring Boot's managed version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x manages the plugin version; specifying an explicit version can cause conflicts.
The dependency is no longer needed or is managed differently in the new Spring Boot version.
